pr.title: Record: N-gram Two-Pass Score-First Evaluation (0.1290 BPB)

output.summary: Score-first two-pass N-gram caching rescores validation chunks with OAEG mixing and stride-64 neural scoring to leverage full corpus statistics.
techniques: Pass1 builds 9-gram cache across 62M tokens before rescore
Pass2 rescoring all chunks with warm cache mixes neural/N-gram via OAEG
Stride=64 halves neural passes while keeping full 2048-token context
